---
title: Payments Status
description: Current MVP payment status for Varity docs.
---

import { Aside } from '@astrojs/starlight/components';

<PageMeta
  author="Varity Team"
  authorRole="Core Contributors"
  lastUpdated="May 2026"
  stability="beta"
/>

<Aside type="caution">
In-app card checkout, App Store purchase widgets, and payout flows are not part of the currently shipped MVP docs surface.
</Aside>

For the current launch state:

- Billing card-on-file is used to gate deployment access in the developer flow.
- App Store subscription checkout documentation is intentionally removed from this page until that surface is publicly shipped.

If you only need deployment:

- Install `varitykit` with `pipx install varitykit`
- Deploy with `varitykit app deploy`
